name: Sylla Gold Corp.
summary: Sylla Gold Corp., an exploration stage company, acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for limestone and dolomite deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Glencoe carbonate property comprising 33 claims that covers an area of 528 hectares located in Inverness County, Nova Scotia. The company was formerly known as Atlantic Industrial Minerals Incorporated. Sylla Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Bedford, Canada.
